Join the Initiative

Questions or occasional updates

Use the form for questions or project updates. If you represent an academic institution and want to discuss participation, say so in the message and include your role and institution.

Message

Used only to reply and, if you opt in by writing, to send related project notes.

WikiDrift Tracking Wikipedia change and cross-edition disagreement.
